## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] New UI elements have aria-labels or visible text labels
- [ ] All actions are reachable via keyboard (Tab, Enter, Space)
- [ ] No color-only or position-only information
- [ ] Engine changes include tests in `src/tests/engine/`
- [ ] No imports from `src/ui/` in `src/engine/`

## Notes for reviewer

Anything specific to call attention to.
